creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Here’s another fun day trip idea from London! It takes just over an hour to get here by train or you could drive, and the city is so charming with picturesque, historic colleges to see, as part of Cambridge University, and so much more! With markets, walks, punting and even a climb up a Church tower to see an incredible view 😍

And for food, check out the brand new @jwd.noodle that’s just opened in Cambridge, the do the BEST hand pulled noodles and noodle soups as well as delicious sides and they are SUPER AFFORDABLE. They have a 20% off everything at their Cambridge branch until 25th May 2026, so RUN and go and check them out! 🏃 ✅ Fully Halal too!

📍55-57 Regent St, Cambridge, CB2 1AB

transcription.text: Fun day trips from London part 3 and this time I'm taking you to an incredible city that is absolutely perfect for a day trip This is Cambridge where every street feels like a postcard before you start exploring Make sure you get your fuel in and when we heard that JWD Lamy noodle bar has just opened in Cambridge We had to go. These are the guys that are hand pulling noodles at the window. It is mesmerizing to watch They are hand pulled to order and you can pick how wide you want your noodles to be and whether you want the soup version Or the dry version and they also do a range of sides This place will really hit the spot and they are so affordable and they also have a 20% discount The exact dates are in the caption And once you're done wander through the historic colleges and head down to the river because let's be honest You can't come here without punting and if you want a 360 view of Cambridge climb the tower at great st Mary's Church, it is so worth it. So make sure you save this video for your next day trip
